title: Help with graph query
excerpt:
Could you please help me change this query according to new API format? It must return same result as this old one.

posts.author: muhammad (Muhammad)
posts.cookedHtml:
Could you please help me change this query according to new API format? It must return same result as this old one.

“query”: "query {boards(ids: 5387422830) {groups(ids:[“topics”,“group_title”,“new_group”,“new_group28814”,“new_group66463”,“new_group70299”,“new_group17885”]) {title items {name column_values(ids:[“text”, “status_1”]) {title text}}}}}

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @muhammad!

I sent the adapted query in the email thread we have

Cheers,
Matias
